description: SyncPlan output for scene_02 given example_01_marked_script.json and an ElevenLabs timing.json with per-word start/end seconds. Demonstrates (a) wait_after_seconds = 0 where an authored pause follows the anchored word, (b) 0.15 s visual beats elsewhere, (c) 0.3 s at the last animation, and (d) drift absorbed by extending wait_after_seconds rather than leaving a non-zero drift_seconds in the plan.
notes: wait_after_seconds = 0.40 on anim.transform.sec2tan matches the authored micro-pause at word 9 (0.4 s). The authored pause supersedes ElevenLabs' natural period pause.
wait_after_seconds = 0.80 on the final animation matches the landing pause at word 51; the 1.5 s scene-gap is added outside this plan at the editor stage.
drift_seconds = 0.08 is within the 0.15 s per-marker budget; left uncompensated.
